testcase.name: ExportDialog — constructor > stores dialogManager reference
ExportDialog — constructor > showExportTopic is a function
ExportDialog — constructor > showExportChat is a function
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — dialog rendering > null topic → calls dialog.alert and returns early
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — dialog rendering > null chats array → calls dialog.alert and returns early
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — dialog rendering > shows modal with class modal-content
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — dialog rendering > dialog contains markdown format radio button
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — dialog rendering > dialog contains html format radio button
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — dialog rendering > dialog contains pdf format radio button
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — dialog rendering > dialog contains zip format radio button
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — dialog rendering > dialog contains scope radio buttons
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — dialog rendering > dialog contains style radio buttons
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — dialog rendering > dialog contains Export button
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — dialog rendering > dialog contains Cancel button
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — format visibility > selecting PDF format hides style section
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — format visibility > selecting ZIP format hides style section
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — format visibility > selecting Markdown format shows style section
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — format visibility > selecting HTML format shows style section
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — format visibility > ZIP format makes zip-note visible
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — format visibility > Markdown format hides zip-note
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — export actions > Markdown + this-topic: clicking Export calls buildExportMarkdown
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — export actions > Markdown + this-topic: clicking Export calls triggerDownload
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — export actions > ZIP + entire-tree: clicking Export calls buildZipPayload
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — export actions > ZIP + entire-tree: clicking Export calls triggerDownload with a Blob
ExportDialog — showExportTopic() — export actions > Cancel button closes dialog (container no longer visible)
ExportDialog — showExportChat() — dialog rendering > null chat → calls dialog.alert and returns early
ExportDialog — showExportChat() — dialog rendering > shows modal with format radio buttons (markdown, html, pdf)
ExportDialog — showExportChat() — dialog rendering > does NOT include zip format radio in chat mode
ExportDialog — showExportChat() — dialog rendering > does NOT show scope section in chat mode
ExportDialog — showExportChat() — dialog rendering > shows style section in chat mode
ExportDialog — showExportChat() — export actions > Markdown: clicking Export calls buildExportMarkdown
ExportDialog — showExportChat() — export actions > Markdown: clicking Export calls triggerDownload
ExportDialog — showExportChat() — export actions > HTML: clicking Export calls buildExportHtml
ExportDialog — showExportChat() — export actions > HTML: clicking Export calls triggerDownload with .html filename
ExportDialog — showExportChat() — export actions > Cancel button closes dialog
ImportDialog — constructor > stores dialogManager reference
ImportDialog — constructor > showImportDialog is a function
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 1 rendering > shows a drop zone
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 1 rendering > shows merge strategy radio
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 1 rendering > shows replace strategy radio
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 1 rendering > shows new-root strategy radio
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 1 rendering > Import button is initially disabled
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 1 rendering > Phase 1 is initially active
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 1 rendering > Cancel button calls dialog.close
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — file selection > after valid file selected, Import button becomes enabled
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — file selection > validateZipFile is called with the chosen file
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — file selection > file chip shows the file name after selection
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — file selection > drop zone gains file-selected CSS class
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — file selection > invalid file — dialog.alert is called with error detail
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — file selection > invalid file — Import button stays disabled
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 2 (Preview) > clicking Import transitions to Phase 2 (active class)
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 2 (Preview) > Phase 2 shows correct topics-to-create count
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 2 (Preview) > Phase 2 shows correct chats-to-import count
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 2 (Preview) > Phase 2 shows correct conflict count
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 2 (Preview) > Back button returns to Phase 1
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 2 (Preview) > parseZipEntries is called during preparation
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 2 (Preview) > buildImportPlan is called during preparation
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 3 (Import) > clicking Import Now calls executeImport
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 3 (Import) > onComplete is called with correct shape
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 3 (Import) > Phase 3 becomes active after import
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 3 (Import) > done content becomes visible
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 3 (Import) > done header says Import Complete
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 3 (Import) > Done button calls dialog.close
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 3 (Import) > Replace strategy: no secondary confirm dialog is shown
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — Phase 3 (Import) > Replace strategy: executeImport IS called immediately on Import Now click
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — error handling > JSZip.loadAsync rejects → inline error is shown
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — error handling > JSZip.loadAsync rejects → stays on Phase 1
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — error handling > JSZip.loadAsync rejects → Import button is re-enabled
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — error handling > executeImport throws → dialog.alert is called with error message
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — error handling > onComplete throws → dialog.alert is called
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() — error handling > onComplete throws → does not crash silently
Round-trip flow — mocked engine → ImportDialog → onComplete > full pipeline: validateZipFile is called
Round-trip flow — mocked engine → ImportDialog → onComplete > full pipeline: parseZipEntries is called
Round-trip flow — mocked engine → ImportDialog → onComplete > full pipeline: buildImportPlan is called
Round-trip flow — mocked engine → ImportDialog → onComplete > full pipeline: executeImport is called
Round-trip flow — mocked engine → ImportDialog → onComplete > onComplete receives updatedTopics as a non-null object
Round-trip flow — mocked engine → ImportDialog → onComplete > onComplete receives updatedRootTopics as an array
Round-trip flow — mocked engine → ImportDialog → onComplete > onComplete receives updatedChats as an array
Round-trip flow — mocked engine → ImportDialog → onComplete > onComplete receives summary with required properties
Round-trip flow — mocked engine → ImportDialog → onComplete > imported chat has correct title
Round-trip flow — mocked engine → ImportDialog → onComplete > imported chat has correct source
Round-trip flow — mocked engine → ImportDialog → onComplete > done screen displays correct topics-created count
Round-trip flow — mocked engine → ImportDialog → onComplete > done screen displays correct chats-imported count
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() public API wiring > DOM is available immediately after showImportDialog() call
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() public API wiring > Import button is disabled before file selection
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() public API wiring > file selection enables Import button
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() public API wiring > clicking Import ▶ transitions to Phase 2
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() public API wiring > clicking Import Now ▶ calls executeImport
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() public API wiring > onComplete is invoked after Import Now ▶
ImportDialog — showImportDialog() public API wiring > Phase 3 done screen is shown after successful import
ImportDialog — strategy forwarding to buildImportPlan > merge strategy: buildImportPlan is called with "merge"
ImportDialog — strategy forwarding to buildImportPlan > replace strategy: buildImportPlan is called with "replace"
ImportDialog — strategy forwarding to buildImportPlan > new-root strategy: buildImportPlan is called with "new-root"
ImportDialog — strategy forwarding to buildImportPlan > default strategy (no explicit selection) is "merge"
ImportDialog — Merge strategy end-to-end > merge: no confirmation dialog is shown
ImportDialog — Merge strategy end-to-end > merge: executeImport is called
ImportDialog — Merge strategy end-to-end > merge: onComplete is invoked
ImportDialog — Merge strategy end-to-end > merge: Phase 3 becomes active
ImportDialog — Merge strategy end-to-end > merge: done content is visible
ImportDialog — Merge strategy end-to-end > merge: done screen shows correct topics-created count
ImportDialog — Merge strategy end-to-end > merge: done screen shows correct chats-imported count
ImportDialog — Merge strategy end-to-end > merge: inProgress indicator is hidden after completion
ImportDialog — Merge strategy end-to-end > merge: Done ✓ button is visible
ImportDialog — Replace strategy end-to-end > replace: no confirm dialog is shown — Import Now proceeds immediately
ImportDialog — Replace strategy end-to-end > replace confirmed: executeImport is called
ImportDialog — Replace strategy end-to-end > replace: executeImport is called with null tree and empty chats
ImportDialog — Replace strategy end-to-end > replace: onComplete is invoked
ImportDialog — Replace strategy end-to-end > replace: Phase 3 becomes active
ImportDialog — Replace strategy end-to-end > replace: done screen is visible
ImportDialog — Replace strategy end-to-end > replace: inline replace warning banner is shown in Phase 2
ImportDialog — Replace strategy end-to-end > replace: inline replace warning banner is hidden for merge strategy
ImportDialog — New-Root strategy end-to-end > new-root: no confirmation dialog is shown
ImportDialog — New-Root strategy end-to-end > new-root: buildImportPlan is called with "new-root"
ImportDialog — New-Root strategy end-to-end > new-root: executeImport is called
ImportDialog — New-Root strategy end-to-end > new-root: onComplete is invoked
ImportDialog — New-Root strategy end-to-end > new-root: Phase 3 becomes active
ImportDialog — New-Root strategy end-to-end > new-root: done content is visible
ImportDialog — New-Root strategy end-to-end > new-root: done screen shows correct topics-created count
ImportDialog — New-Root strategy end-to-end > new-root: done screen shows correct chats-imported count
validateZipFile() > returns invalid when called with null
validateZipFile() > returns invalid when called with undefined
validateZipFile() > returns invalid for an empty object with no name or size
validateZipFile() > returns valid for a .zip file with size > 0 and application/zip MIME type
validateZipFile() > returns invalid for a .txt extension regardless of size
validateZipFile() > accepts application/zip MIME type
validateZipFile() > accepts application/x-zip-compressed MIME type
validateZipFile() > returns invalid when size is 0
validateZipFile() > returns invalid when size exceeds 500 MB
validateZipFile() > returns valid for a 499 MB file
validateZipFile() > accepts a file with .zip extension even when MIME type is unknown
parseZipEntries() > returns empty structure for null input
parseZipEntries() > returns empty structure for an empty array
parseZipEntries() > returns a warnings array for null/empty input
parseZipEntries() > detects the _metadata.json from well-formed entries
parseZipEntries() > parses exactly 2 chatFiles from well-formed entries, excluding _topic.json, README.md and _metadata.json
parseZipEntries() > strips the common root folder prefix from paths
parseZipEntries() > sets topicPath to "Work/Projects" for a file inside Work/Projects/
parseZipEntries() > builds topicFolders Map with an entry for each unique folder
parseZipEntries() > returns metadata: null when no _metadata.json is present
parseZipEntries() > does not push a warning for the mere absence of metadata
parseZipEntries() > sets metadata to null and adds a warning when _metadata.json is corrupt JSON
parseZipEntries() > does not stop parsing when _metadata.json is corrupt — still returns chatFiles
parseZipEntries() > assigns an empty topicPath to .md files effectively at the root level
parseZipEntries() > includes chatFiles from subdirectories
parseZipEntries() > parses flat single-entry correctly (strips solo-segment root)
parseZipEntries() > records a warning for unrecognised non-standard file extensions
parseZipEntries() > wires parentPath on child topic folder entries
parseZipEntries() > lists Work/Projects as a child of Work
parseZipEntries() > restores original topic name case from _topic.json (e.g. "ai" folder → "AI" name)
parseZipEntries() > falls back to folder name when _topic.json has no name field
parseChatFromMarkdown() > extracts title from YAML frontmatter
parseChatFromMarkdown() > extracts source from YAML frontmatter
parseChatFromMarkdown() > extracts url from YAML frontmatter
parseChatFromMarkdown() > parses the date field to a millisecond timestamp
parseChatFromMarkdown() > always generates an id that starts with "imported_"
parseChatFromMarkdown() > generates a unique id on every call
parseChatFromMarkdown() > falls back to the filename (without .md) as title when frontmatter has no title
parseChatFromMarkdown() > defaults source to "imported" when frontmatter omits source
parseChatFromMarkdown() > defaults url to an empty string when frontmatter omits url
parseChatFromMarkdown() > defaults timestamp to approximately Date.now() when date is absent
parseChatFromMarkdown() > sets metadata.isExcerpt to false
parseChatFromMarkdown() > sets metadata.importedAt to approximately now
parseChatFromMarkdown() > sets metadata.originalChatId from the chat_id frontmatter field
parseChatFromMarkdown() > sets metadata.originalChatId to null when chat_id is absent
parseChatFromMarkdown() > sets messageCount from the frontmatter field when present
parseChatFromMarkdown() > sets messageCount to 0 when frontmatter omits it
parseChatFromMarkdown() > parses messages from ### User / ### Assistant headings in the export markdown
parseChatFromMarkdown() > returns empty messages array when content has no role headings
parseChatFromMarkdown() > always returns topicId as null
parseChatFromMarkdown() > always returns tags as an empty array
parseChatFromMarkdown() > handles content with no frontmatter — uses filename as title
parseChatFromMarkdown() > uses "Untitled" when filename is falsy (|| "Untitled" fallback on line 348)
parseChatFromMarkdown() > parses the exported frontmatter field without throwing
parseChatFromMarkdown() > parses the contentFormat frontmatter field without throwing
parseChatFromMarkdown() > parses excerpt:true in frontmatter without throwing
parseChatFromMarkdown() > parses excerpt:false in frontmatter without throwing
parseChatFromMarkdown() > handles null content gracefully — returns a valid chat object
parseChatFromMarkdown() > accepts an empty topicPathStr without throwing
parseChatFromMarkdown() > stores the full markdown content in the content field
parseMessagesFromExportMarkdown() > parses user and assistant turns correctly
parseMessagesFromExportMarkdown() > handles multi-turn conversations
parseMessagesFromExportMarkdown() > returns empty array when no role headings present
parseMessagesFromExportMarkdown() > returns empty array for null/empty input
parseMessagesFromExportMarkdown() > preserves markdown content inside message turns
buildImportPlan() — null / edge cases > returns an empty plan without throwing when zipEntries is null
buildImportPlan() — null / edge cases > defaults to merge strategy when strategy is undefined (strategy || "merge" fallback)
buildImportPlan() — null / edge cases > uses default Map when zipEntries has no topicFolders (= new Map() fallback)
buildImportPlan() — null / edge cases > uses default [] when zipEntries has no chatFiles (= [] fallback)
buildImportPlan() — merge strategy > returns an object with the required plan keys
buildImportPlan() — merge strategy > sends all topics to topicsToCreate when existingTree is null
buildImportPlan() — merge strategy > puts "Work" and "Work/Projects" into topicsToMerge when they exist in tree
buildImportPlan() — merge strategy > puts "Personal" into topicsToCreate since it has no match in existingTree
buildImportPlan() — merge strategy > summary.chats equals the number of chatFiles imported
buildImportPlan() — merge strategy > summary.topics equals topicsToCreate.length + topicsToMerge.length
buildImportPlan() — merge strategy > summary.conflicts is a non-negative number
buildImportPlan() — merge strategy > detects duplicate chats within the same import (same title, source, ~same time)
buildImportPlan() — merge strategy > chatsToImport arrays use objects with chatEntry and targetTopicPath
buildImportPlan() — replace strategy > puts all topics into topicsToCreate even when they exist in existingTree
buildImportPlan() — replace strategy > leaves topicsToMerge empty for replace strategy
buildImportPlan() — create_root strategy > does not create an artificial wrapper topic
buildImportPlan() — create_root strategy > creates all imported folders as root or nested topics — no wrapper
buildImportPlan() — create_root strategy > top-level imported folders have parentName null (become root topics)
buildImportPlan() — create_root strategy > does not merge anything — topicsToMerge is empty
buildImportPlan() — create_root strategy > chat targetTopicPath uses the original ZIP folder path (no wrapper prefix)
buildImportPlan() — create_root strategy > treats "new-root" as an alias for create_root strategy
executeImport() > returns a valid empty result when plan is null
executeImport() > generates topic ids that start with "topic_imported_"
executeImport() > creates the correct number of new topics
executeImport() > imports the correct number of chats
executeImport() > links each imported chat to its topic via the chatIds array
executeImport() > updates firstChatDate on the target topic
executeImport() > updates lastChatDate on the target topic
executeImport() > summary.topicsCreated equals the number of new topics created
executeImport() > summary.topicsMerged equals the number of merge entries in the plan
executeImport() > summary.chatsImported equals the number of chats added
executeImport() > summary.errors is an array (empty when no errors occur)
executeImport() > does NOT mutate the original tree object
executeImport() > does NOT mutate the original chats array
executeImport() > updatedChats contains the original chats plus newly imported ones
executeImport() > updatedTopics contains original topics plus all new topic entries
executeImport() > preserves original root topics alongside any new top-level topics
executeImport() > merges chats into the correct existing topic when using merge strategy
executeImport() > handles existingTree with rootTopicIds missing (|| [] fallback on line 439)
executeImport() > handles topics without children property in walkTopic (|| [] fallback on line 444)
executeImport() > handles orphaned child ID in walkTopic (early return when topic not found, line 439)
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport > produces the correct number of topics in updatedTopics
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport > produces the correct number of chats in updatedChats
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport > creates a topic named "Work" in updatedTopics
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport > creates a topic named "Projects" in updatedTopics
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport > creates a topic named "Personal" in updatedTopics
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport > sets "Projects" as a child of "Work"
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport > has "Work" and "Personal" as root topics
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport > preserves the full markdown content in updatedChats[*].content
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport > assigns each chat to a non-null topicId after executeImport
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport > all topic ids in updatedRootTopics exist as keys in updatedTopics
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport > all chatIds stored on topics reference actual chats in updatedChats
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport (new-root) > creates TWO root topics (Work and Personal) — no wrapper
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport (new-root) > root topic names are the ZIP top-level folder names, not a wrapper
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport (new-root) > no topic named "Imported YYYY-MM-DD" exists
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport (new-root) > all chats have a non-null topicId (none are unlinked)
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport (new-root) > each linked chat appears in its topic chatIds
Round-trip: parseZipEntries → buildImportPlan → executeImport (new-root) > imports the same number of chats as the merge strategy
executeImport() – branch edge cases > handles tree with topics but no rootTopicIds array
executeImport() – branch edge cases > deep-clones topics that lack children/chatIds (|| [] fallback on lines 613-614)
executeImport() – branch edge cases > handles tree where rootTopicIds is not an array
executeImport() – branch edge cases > records an error when parent folder path cannot be resolved for a nested topic
executeImport() – branch edge cases > catches errors thrown during individual chat import and records them in summary.errors
executeImport() – branch edge cases > updatedChats defaults to [] when chats arg is not an array
executeImport() – branch edge cases > sets topicId to null when chat targetTopicPath is not in folderToId map
executeImport() – branch edge cases > skips duplicate chatId push when chatId already in topic.chatIds
executeImport() – branch edge cases > does not update lastChatDate when an earlier-timestamp chat is added to an existing range
executeImport() – branch edge cases > does not update firstChatDate or lastChatDate when chat timestamp is not a number
executeImport() – branch edge cases > creates a topic without folderPath (item.folderPath falsy) and attaches it to root
executeImport() – branch edge cases > handles parentTopic missing from updatedTopics when parentId resolves via merge
validateZipFile() – MIME vs extension combinations > returns valid when MIME is application/zip but extension is NOT .zip
validateZipFile() – MIME vs extension combinations > returns invalid when file.size is a non-number
validateZipFile() – MIME vs extension combinations > returns invalid when file name is an empty string
validateZipFile() – MIME vs extension combinations > returns invalid when file name is not a string
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > sets firstChatDate and lastChatDate from a single chat with timestamp
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > updates firstChatDate when a newer import has an earlier timestamp
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > updates lastChatDate when a newer import has a later timestamp
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > does NOT update dates for chats where ts is not a number
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > does NOT set dates when topicId is null (chat without a topic)
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > does not add duplicate chatIds when the same chat is imported twice
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > sort puts shallow topic before deeper topic (sort comparator deep < shallow = negative)
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > does not push duplicate root topic when executeImport called twice with same plan
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > sort comparator handles item with no folderPath (depth=0 fallback branch)
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > records error when parent folder path is not resolvable (line 692)
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > handles plan with topicsToMerge=undefined (|| [] fallback on line 637)
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > handles plan with topicsToCreate=undefined (|| [] fallback on line 661)
executeImport() – timestamp update logic > handles plan with chatsToImport=undefined (|| [] fallback on line 702)
